title: The Giants Face a New Threat
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, Children, Nami, Unknown person #8, Robin, Luffy as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My little brother is one of the Hostages?!

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: Hey, Kashi, which way's the school?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami-San and the rest should be close!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's coming from both the school and the library!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, you said Dorry and Brogy have gone crazy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PLEASE HURRY!!! Elder JARUL'S IN TROUBLE!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Near the library -- the straw hats

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I doubt chopper will be back anytime soon, and brook's gone off somewhere. He must be up to something...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to get rid of these arrows before the kids are carried off!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Master Dorry... Master BroG!!! I can't stand seeing 'IGU LIKE THIS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please stop, Captains!! Open your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Domi Reversi possessed giant pirates enroute West Village...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're heading to the harbor, aren't we? If we get there...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No whining!! We're Warriors of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We have no choice, Elder JARULL!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain Dorry and Brogy won't listen to us anymore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't retreat!! There's still something I've got to tell Elbaf.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will tell you everything before I die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Always believed in Elbaf coming together with the rest of the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and that led to his attempt to join the world government!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: But his efforts were shunned and betrayed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...14 years ago, on that fateful day...

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 48 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
